text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What do you need for a party?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Some dank costumes and bussin' food!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I've secured the carrot sticks and juice! We're all
set for good vibes, captain!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Excellent work, Helios! Let's discuss our costume
plans on our way back to the dorms!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Kay! I'm gonna wrap myself all up in bandages to
look like a...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uuh, don't you mean a mummy?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that! I'm gonna wrap myself tight like it's a
corset! It's gonna look straight fire! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Do it for the plot! I think I'll do the same!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Creek. Here's the candy you wanted.
Mind checking if we got the right ones?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Creek, not again! Geez, you 'n' that costume...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Get outta here, you two! You do not wanna get caught by her right now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, o-okay! Running away is kinda my forte!
Helios, we're gone!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But... your mommy... I can be your mommy...
